name: Green Bean and Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds green beans, trimmed, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Drain.
2. Refresh under cold water; drain well. Transfer to a large bowl.
3. Combine mustard and vinegar in a small bowl. Gradually whisk oil. Mix in shallots.
- This can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover beans and dressing separately.
- Refrigerate beans; let dressing stand at room temperature.
4. Mix the dressing and tomatoes into the beans. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
